title: CHAKRA — Temporal Cycle Observatory
description: An offline-first, dependency-free astronomical and calendrical observatory. CHAKRA computes ten calendar traditions, planetary positions, the Hindu pañcāṅga, eclipses and classical jyotiṣa structures from live geometry and orbital mechanics — never from lookup tables — as a set of static web pages plus a byte-parity C99 core (6,590-check JS↔C parity). Includes an interactive mathematics tutor, a relativistic interstellar-tour planner, and a browser-executable public test plan.
